title: Interstellar
text: Interstellar Christopher Nolan Sci-Fi, Adventure, Drama A team of explorers travels through a wormhole to search for a new home for humanity as Earth collapses. Grand cosmic scope with emotional father-daughter core. Themes of time, sacrifice, and survival dominate every act. The film mixes hard science ideas with intimate family grief, making space exploration feel personal.

title: Inception
text: Inception Christopher Nolan Sci-Fi, Action, Thriller A skilled thief enters dreams to steal ideas but is offered redemption through an impossible inception mission. Dream layers create a heist thriller about guilt, memory, and the instability of reality.

title: Tenet
text: Tenet Christopher Nolan Sci-Fi, Action, Thriller A covert operative manipulates time inversion to prevent global catastrophe and confronts paradoxical warfare. Ambitious time mechanics and espionage spectacle, though character clarity is sometimes thin.

title: Oppenheimer
text: Oppenheimer Christopher Nolan Drama, History, Thriller The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer and the moral consequences of building the first atomic bomb. A historical thriller driven by scientific ambition, political paranoia, and moral accountability.

title: Arrival
text: Arrival Denis Villeneuve Sci-Fi, Drama, Mystery A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien visitors and reshape humanity's perception of time. Language and memory become tools for peace. The emotional reveal redefines the entire narrative. Slow and thoughtful science fiction focused on communication, uncertainty, and non-linear time.

title: Blade Runner 2049
text: Blade Runner 2049 Denis Villeneuve Sci-Fi, Drama, Thriller A new blade runner uncovers a secret that forces him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard. Meditative cyberpunk noir with identity, loneliness, and synthetic humanity at its center. A visually controlled sequel that explores memory implants, purpose, and what makes life real.

title: Dune
text: Dune Denis Villeneuve Sci-Fi, Adventure, Drama Paul Atreides joins the Fremen and embraces a dangerous destiny on the desert planet Arrakis. Political prophecy and ecological struggle build a dense world of power and survival.

title: Dune: Part Two
text: Dune: Part Two Denis Villeneuve Sci-Fi, Adventure, Drama Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to wage war while wrestling with prophecy and political power. Expands into religious fanaticism, revenge, and empire while keeping strong desert world-building.

title: Sicario
text: Sicario Denis Villeneuve Crime, Drama, Thriller An FBI agent is pulled into a morally ambiguous operation against a violent drug cartel. Tense border thriller portraying institutional ambiguity, escalation, and ethical compromise.

title: Prisoners
text: Prisoners Denis Villeneuve Crime, Drama, Thriller After two girls disappear, a desperate father and a detective are pushed toward obsession and violence. Dark procedural about parental fear and vigilantism, full of dread and psychological pressure.

title: The Martian
text: The Martian Ridley Scott Sci-Fi, Adventure, Drama An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and grit to survive while Earth plans a rescue. Optimistic engineering story where practical science and international collaboration save one life.

title: Annihilation
text: Annihilation Alex Garland Sci-Fi, Horror, Mystery A biologist enters a mysterious zone where the laws of nature are mutating into unsettling forms. A surreal mutation narrative touching self-destruction, trauma, and biological transformation.

title: Ex Machina
text: Ex Machina Alex Garland Sci-Fi, Drama, Thriller A programmer evaluates a humanoid AI and discovers manipulation, desire, and control. Minimalist AI chamber drama centered on manipulation, gendered power, and consciousness tests.

title: Get Out
text: Get Out Jordan Peele Horror, Mystery, Thriller A young man uncovers disturbing truths when visiting his girlfriend's family estate. Social horror thriller that weaponizes politeness and exposes racial exploitation under liberal surfaces.

title: Nope
text: Nope Jordan Peele Horror, Sci-Fi, Thriller Two siblings investigate a terrifying airborne phenomenon above their family ranch. A genre blend about spectacle economics, animal behavior, and the cost of chasing impossible footage.

title: Parasite
text: Parasite Bong Joon Ho Drama, Thriller A poor family infiltrates a wealthy household through deception, leading to escalating social conflict. Sharp class satire that escalates into thriller territory through spatial inequality and deception.

title: Gone Girl
text: Gone Girl David Fincher Drama, Mystery, Thriller A husband's life unravels when his wife vanishes and media scrutiny turns him into the prime suspect. Media cynicism and toxic marriage dynamics power a mystery full of strategic narrative control.

title: Shutter Island
text: Shutter Island Martin Scorsese Mystery, Thriller A U.S. Marshal investigates a psychiatric facility and confronts a maze of trauma and delusion. Psychological thriller about grief, guilt, and reality distortion inside an isolated institution.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
text: Mad Max: Fury Road George Miller Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max and Furiosa race across the desert to escape a tyrant. High-velocity action with environmental collapse, survival politics, and liberation themes.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
text: Everything Everywhere All at Once Daniel Kwan & Daniel Scheinert Sci-Fi, Adventure, Comedy A laundromat owner is drawn into a multiverse conflict while reconciling family and identity. Multiverse comedy-drama about family reconciliation, identity fractures, and existential burnout.

title: Knives Out
text: Knives Out Rian Johnson Comedy, Crime, Mystery A detective untangles lies and family tensions after a wealthy novelist dies under suspicious circumstances.

title: The Batman
text: The Batman Matt Reeves Action, Crime, Drama Batman confronts a serial killer whose clues expose corruption in Gotham's elite. Neo-noir crime thriller focused on corruption networks, trauma, and institutional decay.
